topic: The Sanad AI Assistant finds the nearest licensed Sanad office to you, tells you exactly what it will cost, and walks you through every step. We built this because the information is scattered and confusing.
format: Open with a question that forces the reader to calculate their own answer: how many work permits are you tracking right now, and where exactly is that information?
post:
How many work permit renewals are due this month across your client companies — and can you tell me the exact number without opening WhatsApp?

If you had to stop and think, that's the problem right there.

The information exists. It's just buried across 12 chat groups, 3 Excel files, and a notebook sitting on someone's desk.

We built the Sanad AI Assistant because there's another half to this problem that's just as exhausting: company owners and HR managers calling your office to ask what a work permit costs, which Sanad office is closest to them, what documents they need to bring.

Questions that should take 30 seconds eat 10 minutes — because the official information is scattered across government websites that weren't built to work together.

The Sanad AI Assistant handles that side instantly. Free, no login, bilingual Arabic and English. It finds licensed Sanad offices by governorate, pulls verified government fees, and puts together a full service quote on the spot.

Your staff stops fielding the same calls on repeat. Your clients get answers before they even think to pick up the phone.

And for the operational side — tracking cases, chasing expiries, assigning tasks, invoicing per service — that's what SmartPro Hub is for.

Try the Sanad AI Assistant free — instant answers on work permits, visas & government fees: www.thesmartpro.io/sanad/assistant

Book a free 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general

Or WhatsApp +96879665522
